message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "Activity" as Activity
participant "BaseMediaActivity" as BaseMediaActivity
participant "MediaActivity" as MediaActivity

Activity -> BaseMediaActivity : onCreate
activate BaseMediaActivity
BaseMediaActivity -> BaseMediaActivity : set theme
BaseMediaActivity -> BaseMediaActivity : setup navigation drawer
deactivate BaseMediaActivity

alt [new activity]
BaseMediaActivity -> MediaActivity : getActionBarTitle()
activate MediaActivity
MediaActivity --> BaseMediaActivity
deactivate MediaActivity
note right of BaseMediaActivity : set home icon to hamburger icon
else [restore action bar]
note right of BaseMediaActivity : get home icon and action bar title from saved instance
end

BaseMediaActivity -> BaseMediaActivity : updateActionBar
activate BaseMediaActivity
BaseMediaActivity -> BaseMediaActivity : updateActionBar
deactivate BaseMediaActivity

alt [no fragment in layout (new activity)]
BaseMediaActivity -> MediaActivity : createFragment()
activate MediaActivity
MediaActivity --> BaseMediaActivity
deactivate MediaActivity
BaseMediaActivity -> BaseMediaActivity : add fragment
activate BaseMediaActivity
BaseMediaActivity --> BaseMediaActivity
deactivate BaseMediaActivity
end

Activity -> BaseMediaActivity : onCreateOptionsMenu
activate BaseMediaActivity
note right of BaseMediaActivity : inflate generic menu items
BaseMediaActivity --> Activity
deactivate BaseMediaActivity

note right of MediaActivity : user selects media item
MediaActivity -> BaseMediaActivity : showFragment()
activate BaseMediaActivity
note right of BaseMediaActivity : sets up the shared element transition and updates the dataholder
BaseMediaActivity -> BaseMediaActivity : replace current fragment with new fragment
activate BaseMediaActivity
BaseMediaActivity --> BaseMediaActivity
deactivate BaseMediaActivity
BaseMediaActivity --> MediaActivity
deactivate BaseMediaActivity

@enduml
